embeds.description: > Although some of the above behaviors occurred outside of this discord server, they caused substantial disruption to our members and      undermined the overall atmosphere of this space.     In accordance with our Discord Community Guidelines, we have made the decision to permanently ban this user

content: Yes, we welcome all forms of contribution. Last time when we did this, our EN translation was still entirely done by AI and it wasn't very reliable. We can discuss how you'd like to work once you join.
抱歉守密人，问卷设置有些问题，我们稍后会单独联系您🙇‍♂️
